method: wallet-centric mark-to-market from deduplicated fact_trade rows; token pnl=sell_notional-buy_notional+positive_position_size*mark_price; roi=pnl/buy_notional; marks use latest orderbook mid when available, otherwise latest price_history; wallet-match rows with negative token positions are excluded; all ranking entries require cumulative wallet pnl > 0 and cumulative wallet roi > 0 within the supplied match scope

ranking_definitions.single_match_profit_wallets: Wallets ranked by their best single-match PnL; rank_match contains the ranking match; wallet_cumulative must also be positive.
ranking_definitions.single_match_roi_wallets_min_buy_100: Wallets ranked by their best single-match ROI with that match buy_notional >= 100; wallet_cumulative must also be positive.
ranking_definitions.multi_match_profit_wallets: Wallets with at least 2 matches ranked by cumulative PnL across the supplied match scope; cumulative PnL and ROI must be positive.
ranking_definitions.multi_match_roi_wallets_min_buy_100: Wallets with at least 2 matches and cumulative buy_notional >= 100 ranked by cumulative ROI; cumulative PnL and ROI must be positive.
